prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约12147→12183→12792→13610→13897名，整体呈逐年后移趋势，近5年累计后移约1750名；2025年基准位次约13897 名，近3年（2023–2025）后移约1105名，后移速度有所加快；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为84人，2024年扩至113人（+34.5%），2025年再扩 至123人（+8.8%）；2026年计划153人，较2025年增加30人（+24.4%），连续三年大幅扩招，对录取位次有显著推后（位次数字增大）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双 一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年约第63名，2022年约第70名，2023年约第71名，2024年约第74名，2025–2026年稳定约第75名，排名近年略有下滑但总体稳定，属中上水 平211；该校在声誉评价文件中未出现明显负面或正面舆情信号，声誉平稳；抖音学校热度总排名中未进入前100名，短视频曝光量一般，报考关注度无明显异常 升温或降温信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档或暴跌记录；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势学科（第四轮学；作为地矿油行业特色211，相关学科在行业内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程 等工科大类2026年社会热度偏热至高热，但该校以地质类、材料类、环境类等传统工科为主，相关专业（地质学类、材料类、地质工程等）社会热度一般或偏冷；北京市2026年高 考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人（+29.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；该校校本部 位于北京市，属于本地高校；university_enr；但作为北京本地211，对本市考生有天然的地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近5年后移约1750名）、2026年招生计划大幅扩招24.4%（推后位次）、北京市考生总数大幅增长29.7%（加剧竞争，抵消部分扩 招效应）、学校声誉平稳无负面冲击、抖音热度一般、专业热度分化等因素，在此基础上考虑考生总数增幅远超扩招比例，竞争净加剧，适度回 调位次。预测2026年最低录取位次约15731名，区间15231–16231名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约15731名，区间15231–16231名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主攻方向（计算机、电气、电子信息等工科热门专业），一档专业（法学、工商管理、会计学等 ）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（地质类、材料类、环境类等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<15231名）可重点冲刺一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>16231名）建议以三档保 底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were approximately 12147 → 12183 → 12792 → 13610 → 13897, showing a gradual backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1750 positions in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13897, with a backward shift of about 1105 positions in the past 3 years (2023–2025), indicating an accelerating pace; the university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Beijing: 84 students each year from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 113 in 2024 (+34.5%), and further expanded to 123 in 2025 (+8.8%); the 2026 plan is 153 students, an increase of 30 students (+24.4%) compared to 2025, with three consecutive years of significant expansion, which has a notable effect of pushing back admission rankings (increasing ranking numbers).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked approximately 63rd in 2021, 70th in 2022, 71st in 2023, 74th in 2024, and stabilized around 75th in 2025–2026, with a slight decline in recent years but overall stability, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the university showed no significant negative or positive public opinion signals in reputation evaluation documents, with a stable reputation; it did not enter the top 100 in the overall TikTok school popularity ranking, with average short video exposure and no abnormal increase or decrease in application attention; no records of sudden drops or crashes in historical admission anomalies; the university's traditional advantageous disciplines are geology and geological resources and geological engineering (fourth round of discipline evaluation); as a characteristic 211 university in the mining and petroleum industry, related disciplines have high recognition within the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering are generally hot to very hot in social popularity, but the university mainly focuses on traditional engineering fields like geology, materials, and environment, with related majors (geology, materials, geological engineering, etc.) having average or low social popularity; the total number of Beijing college entrance examination applicants in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 people (+29.7%) compared to 65,434 in 2025, indicating a significant growth in the number of candidates and intensified competition; the university's main campus is located in Beijing, making it a local university; however, as a local 211 in Beijing, it has a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (a backward shift of about 1750 positions in the past 5 years), the significant 24.4% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (pushing back rankings), the substantial 29.7% increase in the total number of Beijing candidates (intensifying competition, partially offsetting the expansion effect), stable university reputation with no negative impact, average TikTok popularity, and differentiated major popularity, and taking into account that the increase in the number of candidates far exceeds the expansion ratio, leading to net intensified competition, a moderate adjustment in rankings is made. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 15,731, with a range of 15,231–16,231.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 15,731, with a range of 15,231–16,231. If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (popular engineering majors like computer science, electrical engineering, electronic information) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (law, business administration, accounting, etc.) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (geology, materials, environment, etc.) as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<15,231), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>16,231), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options.
